---
title: "\'Meeting at Sion College, The\' by C. M. Yonge"
---

## \'Meeting at Sion College, The\' by C. M. Yonge

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1892
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Mothers in Council</i> 2: 8 (October 1892) 193-194

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
